span.p:
Notify user with:
• What was attempted
• What failed
• Partial results
• Suggested next steps

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Applies to:
• All retries exhausted
• Circuit breaker OPEN
• User confirmation needed

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Break into smaller
subtasks
Spawn smaller agents

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Applies to:
• Task too complex
• Max depth reached
• Partial failure

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Meta-agent rewrites
task description
Based on failure reason

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Applies to:
• Wrong approach
• Tool mismatch
• Ambiguous task

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Same agent
Same task
Try again

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Applies to:
• Network transient
• Timeout < 30s
• Rate limit hit

💸 Budget Exhaustion
tokens | time | cost limit

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🔍 DETECT
Monitor all agents
Correlation ID tracking

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🔴 OPEN
Block requests
Route to alternative

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
🟡 HALF-OPEN
Test with N calls
Limited traffic

span.p:
⏱️ STUCK DETECTOR
No tool calls for N sec
→ Trigger escalation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔻 DEPTH GUARD
Enforce max_depth
→ Reject spawn if exceeded

📄 TOKEN GUARD
Global + per-branch
budget enforcement
